description_for_human: A mobile learning app for daily coding practice with personalized problems, AI Tutor explanations, streak tracking, and syntax-highlighted solutions.
description_for_model: LeetCode Daily is an educational mobile app (iOS & Android) that delivers personalized daily coding challenges in 6 languages (Java, Python, C++, JavaScript, C#, Go) across 3 skill levels. Features include AI Tutor for step-by-step problem explanations, streak tracking, offline support, push reminders, and a Pro subscription for expanded access. Blog at https://leetcodedaily.app/blog/
